title: Puniru is a Kawaii Slime
titleNative: ぷにるはかわいいスライム
synopsis: Kotaro is an average young boy, and like many kids his age, he enjoys the latest childhood craze of playing with slime. One day, the slime randomly turns into an adorable girl who he names Puniru. Though cute, her stubbornness and constant need for attention get on his nerves. It’s like having a goopy little sister! Just when the two settle into their not-so-normal life, the granddaughter of Kyuthi Land’s founder arrives. Can Okanega Alice and her little friend Runrune out-cute the world’s most adorable slime girl?! (Source: Seven Seas Entertainment)
searchTerms: ぷにるはかわいいスライム

title: Oishinbo
synopsis: Around the offices of Tozai News, Shiro Yamaoka has a reputation for being over-blunt, under-ambitious, and generally an all-around slacker. So why has he been given the important job of coming up with the "Ultimate Menu" to celebrate the newspaper's 100th anniversary? Because he possesses qualities his other colleagues don't: an exquisitely discerning palate, an encyclopedic knowledge of food and drink, and a masterful touch in the kitchen. (Source: VIZ Media)

title: Kumagurashi
synopsis: Kumada is an office worker who lives his life by avoiding all kinds of risks: "If you're prepared, there's no need to worry.'' "Better safe than sorry'' "A gentleman does not approach danger." One day, a bear suddenly appears in his house as he is enjoying his bachelor lifestyle. It's also a mysterious bear who does housework...!?

tags.name: Animals
tags.description: Prominently features animal characters in a leading role.

title: Battle Studies
synopsis: You can't win through only with "friendship" and "youth." We stake our lives to get to the Koshien!! Kanou Shoutarou entered an official baseball club at one of the best powerhouse baseball schools in the country - DL Gakuen. However the discipline in the club, he admired so much, was beyond all imagination! From Nakibokuro—the former member of PL Gakuen's baseball club who played at the Koshien as the regular!

latestChapterTitle: No Man Better With No Outs

title: Fuuto Tantei
synopsis: In the ecologically-minded city of Fuuto, mysterious devices resembling USB flash drives called Gaia Memories are used by criminals and other interested parties to become monsters called Dopants, committing crimes with the police force powerless to stop them. To make matters worse, the Gaia Memories carry a dangerous toxin that cause their users to go insane to the point where they could die from the life-threatening devices. After the death of his boss, the self-proclaimed hard-boiled detective Shoutarou Hidari works with the mysterious Philip to investigate crimes which involve Dopants. Using their own Gaia Memories, Shoutarou and Philip use the Double Driver belts to transform and combine into Kamen Rider Double to fight the Dopant menace and keep Fuuto safe. (Source: Kamen Rider W Wiki) Note: Fuuto Tantei is a manga adaptation and sequel of the 2009 drama TV series Kamen Rider W .

title: Brenny-wa Binjari
synopsis: The story of a possessed person in a book who will not hesitate to kill for her goal. Brinny, who lived in obedience to her stepfather, thought it had nothing to do with her. Until she got involved in an incident with the sickly second prince, Lucian. At a moment of crisis, Brinny used her supernatural powers to save Lucian, and was relieved that everything was resolved when she saw that the possessed person, 'Aridna', was captured. However, for some reason, her beloved sister and the first prince died in a carriage accident, and even Lucian, who became her fiancé, began to act strangely. Wasn't the possessed person executed in the past? Is 'Aridna' still alive? Brinny decides to reclaim the empty space left by the disappearance of her precious people. She will fight the possessed person. (Source: Kakaopage, translated)

title: Chiisakute Kawaii Bungei-bu no Chitekina Senpai wo, Hiza no Ue ni Nosetara Mainichi Suwatte kuru You ni Natta
titleRomaji: Chiisakute Kawaii Bungei-bu no Chitekina Senpai wo, Hiza no Ue ni Nosetara Mainichi Suwatte kuru You ni Natta
titleNative: 小さくて可愛い文芸部の知的な先輩を、膝の上に乗せたら毎日座ってくるようになった
synonyms: After I Let The Small And Cute Intellectual Senior Of The Literature Club Sit On My Lap, She Started Sitting There Every Day
synopsis: One day, the Literature Club lends out its chairs to other clubs, leaving only a single chair behind. Shou and Yuzu are the only two left in the clubroom, and they end up in a lighthearted argument over who should sit in the remaining chair. Each wants the other to take the seat, and neither is willing to back down out of kindness. In the end, Yuzu gets her way, and Shou is forced to sit in the chair alone. Shou feels bad about being the only one sitting... until a sudden idea strikes him. “If I’m sitting in the chair, then I can become the chair and let Senpai Yuzu sit on my lap, right?” Or so he thinks.

title: The Legendary Witch Is Reborn as an Oppressed Princess
titleEnglish: The Legendary Witch Is Reborn as an Oppressed Princess
titleRomaji: Shiitagerareta Tsuihou Oujo wa, Tenseishita Densetsu no Majo Deshita
titleNative: 虐げられた追放王女は、転生した伝説の魔女でした
synopsis: Princess Claudia's life should be tragic… pushed from a window by her uncle, coldly ignored, and dismissed by all. But when her past-life memories awaken, she remembers she was Adelheid, a legendary witch who once commanded legions of magicians. Now reborn, she refuses to be anything but herself: fabulously powerful and utterly carefree! (Source: Titan Manga)

title: Mujin
synopsis: Lee Seon-Ho was falsely accused of parricide crime for murdering his own father. He lived through each day without being able to die. One day, Seon-Ho was approached by a mysterious old man and offered a desired deal that he could never refuse… (Source: Naver, translated)

title: Ijime no Jikan
synopsis: "May I never be born again." Trying to throw himself off the roof of the school is Ayumu, a boy who lived an ordinary junior high school life until half a year ago. What pushed him to this point? And what is the true ending that awaits...?

title: Zoufu no Hanataba
synopsis: The story begins when middle schooler Ryuunosuke visits his grandmother's house on an island. As Ryuunosuke walks past the stairs leading to the second floor, a strange, plant-like thing extends down from above. Intrigued, Ryuunosuke tries to climb the stairs, but his uncle stops him with an uncharacteristically grim facial expression, saying, “What are you doing?” and “You'd better not go up there.” That night, however, Ryuunosuke's curiosity drives him to go upstairs after all... (Source: Natalie, translated)

title: Haimiya-senpai wa Kowakute Kawaii
titleNative: 灰宮先輩は怖くてかわいい
synonyms: Haimiya Senpai is Scary but Cute
synopsis: Haimiya-senpai is feared around school for her intimidating appearance and blunt way of speaking... Sparkling piercings! Bleached-gray wolf-cut hair!! And speaking in the Kansai dialect!!! But for some reason, this scary senpai always seems to treat me kindly—!? See how “scary” turns into “cute” in this romantic comedy! (Source: Square Enix, translated)
